Karnal Tubewell Operator Recruitment 2026

paragraphs: Karnal Tubewell Operator Recruitment 2026: Block Development and Panchayat Officer, Indri (Karnal) has issued a notification for the position of Tubewell Operator (Jalkarmi). The recruitment drive comprises 09 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 10 June 2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the Karnal Tubewell Operator Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
